sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, data BLOB);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data) VALUES (1, encode('sample_data_ü'));
UPDATE test_table SET data = encode('updated_data_ö') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, data FROM test_table WHERE data = encode('sample_data_ü');
SELECT id, data FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
